final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input d,
    output reg q,
    output reg q_n
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (~reset) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

    assign q_n = ~q;

endmodule
